title: Luma and the Whispering Stream
cover_prompt: A small, round creature with soft fur and closed eyes, curled beside a gentle glowing stream at dusk. Fireflies drift above the water, and the sky fades into warm purples and blues. The scene is painted in soft watercolor, with dreamy, muted colors.
lyrics:
[verse]
Mmm ooh laa luu
Shaa naa noo noo
Tss pff mmm aah
Hoo laa shh shh

[verse]
Luu naa mmm ooh
Shaa laa tss tss
Pff noo mmm aah
Hoo shh luu luu

[verse]
Mmm ooh shh shh
Shaa naa pff pff
Tss luu mmm aah
Hoo shh shh shh

---
style_prompt: Gentle folk lullaby, warm female vocal, fingerpicked acoustic guitar, 64 BPM, pastoral, settling, peaceful, evening atmosphere, descending melody phrases, each verse quieter, conversational singing, the world going to sleep, soft piano accompaniment

character.name: Luma
character.identity: A tiny, sleepy creature who lives by the river and hums the world to stillness.
character.special: Their voice mirrors the sound of the river, guiding little ones into quiet.

about: A soothing lullaby where the rhythm of the stream slows and softens, mirroring the breath of sleep. The descending patterns gently guide restless energy into stillness, like water settling into calm. Perfect for little ones who need the world to slow down around them.
